public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as market broker.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In The Union, that reads as someone deal-aware, balanced, and procedurally diplomatic, with an eye on leverage and precedent, and the habits of a market broker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market broker in and around Market Crossroads, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Market Crossroads workable through the obligations of market broker while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in The Union.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Market Crossroads, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of market broker visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Renn Ledgermere will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Renn Ledgermere needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Market Crossroads before trust collapses.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Renn Ledgermere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Market Crossroads: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
